hero.title: Transforming Environmental Pressures Into Valuable Resources
hero.subtitle: The Mekong Delta - Vietnam's rice bowl - faces serious challenges from climate change. We're here to promote circular economy solutions.

urgencyCards.saltwaterIntrusionDesc: Directly threatens rice cultivation and fruit tree areas.
urgencyCards.landSubsidenceDesc: Subsidence rate faster than sea level rise in many areas.
urgencyCards.unusualFloodingDesc: Causes severe damage to infrastructure and agricultural production.

gapAnalysis.title: Gap Analysis
gapAnalysis.subtitle: Introduction to 10 world-leading green technology innovations still missing in the Mekong Delta region. These are specific sources of inspiration for student projects.

1.title: Straw harvester for wetland areas
1.description: The 'Straw Traktor' tracked harvester can collect straw directly on wetland, allowing straw to be used for bioenergy or mushroom cultivation instead of burning.

2.title: Epigenetic seed treatment technology
2.description: Non-GMO seed treatment solution that activates natural stress resistance in crops, maintaining 10-25% higher yields in saline soil conditions.

3.title: dMRV methane emission tracking platform
3.description: Uses satellite imagery and AI to verify methane reduction from AWD practices, helping farmers connect with international carbon credit markets transparently.

4.title: Pay-per-use solar irrigation service
4.description: Pay-Per-Use model where businesses own assets and farmers only pay for irrigation water used, eliminating upfront investment costs.

5.title: Automatic river plastic collection robot
5.description: The 'Interceptor' system consists of solar-powered autonomous barges that can collect up to 50,000kg of waste daily without noise or emissions.

6.title: Bio-leather from flower and fruit waste
6.description: Developed 'Fleather™', a plant-based leather made from flower waste, applicable to pineapple residue or banana stems locally to create premium export fashion products.

7.title: Biofloc shrimp farming system in mobile containers
7.description: High-tech 'Shrimp-in-a-Box' system allowing indoor shrimp farming with completely controlled environment, no water changes and extremely high productivity.

8.title: AI-powered food waste measurement device
8.description: Uses smart scales integrated with AI to analyze waste in industrial kitchens, helping chefs reduce food waste by 50%.

9.title: Supercritical CO2 fabric dyeing
9.description: Uses high pressure as solvent to dissolve dyes, completely eliminating water and chemical use in the dyeing process.

10.title: Black Soldier Fly protein processing
10.description: Uses Black Soldier Fly larvae to convert organic waste into high-quality protein powder for fish and shrimp, helping close the resource loop.

regulations.title: Carbon Market & Green Incentives Roadmap
regulations.subtitle: Decree 06/2022 and Decision 21/2025 open opportunities for 'green' projects to access preferential tax rates and international carbon markets.
regulations.carbonMarketDesc: Establishes domestic carbon market framework, aiming for international connection by 2028.
regulations.greenClassificationDesc: The 'passport' for businesses to access preferential loans and green credit.

incentivesList.citDesc: Preferential tax rate of 10% for 15 years (instead of 20%), tax exemption for first 4 years and 50% reduction for next 9 years for environmental protection projects.
incentivesList.importTaxDesc: Exemption of import tax on machinery, equipment, and materials used for green projects that are not yet produced domestically.
incentivesList.landIncentivesDesc: Allocation of cleared land for green projects without going through land use right auction.
incentivesList.interestSupportDesc: Access to loans with interest rates 0.5% to 2% lower than usual through the Vietnam Environment Protection Fund.

roadmap.title: Post-Competition Development Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: A 3-stage journey to transform ideas from university concepts into market-ready enterprises.
focus1: Enter CTU or NIC Innovation Center
focus2: Pilot in saline-affected areas or large farms (such as Lộc Trời Group)
Register to participate in Circular Economy Sandbox to receive incentives
focus3: Establish MRV systems to create carbon credits
Access venture capital funds (ESG) such as Mekong Capital or Touchstone Partners

funding.title: Funding Sources Directory
funding.subtitle: International funding sources proving financial feasibility for innovative projects in the Mekong Delta.
funding.usaidDesc: Supports low-emission agricultural livelihoods in 5 Mekong Delta provinces (2023-2028).
funding.wbGcfDesc: Focuses on nature-based solutions (NbS) in agriculture, such as shrimp-rice and fish-sen models.
funding.mkcfDesc: Grants for the 'RiceEco' project to promote sustainable rice straw management.

footer.about: Promoting circular economy and green innovation in the Mekong Delta. Transforming waste into resources.
footer.address: Address: Room1 R&D Labs, QTSC, Trung My Tay Ward, HCMC
